arts.ttl: Newcastle United learn of 'elephant in room' at Premier League meeting
arts.sum: Before you even get into the 115 charges, Manchester City have launched a fresh legal challenge against the Premier League's amended associated party transactions (APT) rules and top-flight clubs had not yet been informed that the original regulations were found to be 'void and unenforceable' by a tribunal panel when stakeholders met earlier this month. Premier League clubs have decided to stick with the current PSR rules because of the 'uncertainty' surrounding Manchester City's legal fight.

arts.ttl: What Jorrel Hato said about Liverpool transfer after Anfield visit as Andy Robertson claim made
arts.sum: Andy Robertson and Kostas Tsimikas are Liverpool's current left-backs but the club are planning for life without one or even both of them

arts.ttl: Arne Slot makes demand to Liverpool fans as Reds seek to pull further clear in title race
arts.sum: Liverpool boss Arne Slot is looking forward to experiencing the Anfield atmosphere when the Reds welcome Newcastle United to Merseyside and look to extend their Premier League lead

arts.ttl: Liverpool vs Newcastle United predicted XI - injury doubts, formation change and star rested - Chronicle Live
arts.sum: The Scotland international has played a lot of football recently, so this may be an opportunity to freshen up the team, although the rest of the defence - Alisson becker in goal, the central duo of Ibrahima Konate and skipper Virgil van Dijk, with Conor Bradley's injury meaning Trent Alexander-Arnold has to go again. Liverpool, meanwhile, are at the end of a hectic run of eight games in 26 days but it's unlikely manager Arne Slot will rest many of his stars against a Newcastle team that are now level on points with fourth-placed City in the fight for Champions League football.

arts.ttl: Newcastle ‘Seriously Considering’ Move to Sign ‘Unstoppable’ Forward
arts.sum: Newcastle are in need of a right-winger this summer and one star has been touted after bizarre recent developmenets

arts.ttl: Mohamed Salah opens up on private talk with ex-Arsenal manager and advice he received
arts.sum: Mohamed Salah has scored 30 goals and registered 21 assists for Liverpool so far this season, and the Egyptian star has now revealed the advice he received from an unlikely source

arts.ttl: Arne Slot touchline ban: What can Liverpool boss do, and where?
arts.sum: Liverpool manager Arne Slot has been given a two-match touchline ban, but what does it mean and how involved will he be?

arts.ttl: Liverpool vs. Newcastle United: Arne Slot learns Merseyside derby punishments, will Dutchman be in dugout for Premier League clash?
arts.sum: Liverpool manager Arne Slot discovers whether he will be able to take his place in the dugout against Newcastle United having learned his punishment for his part in the post-match scenes after the Merseyside derby.

arts.ttl: Chris Wood looking to build on 'unusual stat' after outperforming Erling Haaland and Mo Salah
arts.sum: Only three players have scored more goals than Chris Wood in the Premier League this season, with the Nottingham Forest star aiming to fire his team into the Champions League

arts.ttl: Arne Slot signing could still miss out on Liverpool Premier League winner's medal
arts.sum: A Liverpool summer signing is still running the risk of missing out on a Premier League winners' medal if, as expected, Arne Slot's side go on to clinch the title this season
